signals.reason: Tier 2 high-excitement destination with staggering absolute value. Paired with a live Wizz Air flash fare of ~€50 RT from Sofia, booking a bungalow here at €85/night is a steal. Crucially, the property has extensive pool facilities to act as an afternoon heat refuge for a 4-year-old. The 4-night window perfectly balances transit friction against the high value of a major European capital.

Tier 1 low-friction drive (2.5h from Plovdiv). Available at a competitive €128/night during the 29th Bansko Jazz Festival. As a low-excitement summer mountain town, the stay is strictly capped at an optimal 3 nights to prevent toddler boredom. The property offers exceptional 5-star indoor kids' clubs and pools, delivering very high utility for the price.

Tier 1 extreme low-friction play (1.5h drive). The live Summer Spa Getaway package comes in at ~€141/night including half-board (breakfast and dinner) plus daily children's animation. Designed as a short, punchy 3-night weekend break to maximize enjoyment without exhausting the town's appeal, providing robust value and zero transit fatigue.

Tier 2 high-excitement island resort. Newly renovated for 2026 with a toddler-friendly lazy river, and features a live 'Kids Go Free' promo. The 7-night window is ideal for a premium Greek island, but the high baseline luxury price and necessity of a flight from Sofia limits it to a logging-only score.
